data.title: Woodlands Financial Services Co. (OTC Pink: WDFN) declares $0.29/share quarterly cash dividend on common stock for Feb 27.
data.description: Yesterday, on January 26, 2026, Woodlands Financial Services Company (OTC Pink: WDFN) announced a quarterly cash dividend of twenty-nine cents per share for its common stock. The dividend is scheduled to be paid on February 27, 2026, to shareholders.

data.title: Wolters Kluwer report: Nearly half of nurses use AI at work. New insights on AI in nursing practice. Passion for patient care remains strong.
data.description: Wolters Kluwer Health in Waltham, Mass has introduced a new report as part of its Future Ready Healthcare program titled "Nursing insights: Redefining nursing practice for an AI-driven future." Despite ongoing challenges such as staffing shortages and career satisfaction issues, nurses remain dedicated to providing excellent patient care. The report focuses on exploring the impact of technologies like GenAI on nursing practices.

data.title: PathSolutions releases TotalView 15 for network monitoring and troubleshooting in Santa Clara, Calif.
data.description: Located in Santa Clara, California, PathSolutions has recently launched version 15 of their TotalView Network Monitoring & Root-Cause Troubleshooting solution. This update demonstrates their continued commitment to cybersecurity with enhanced features and capabilities for users.

data.title: 5th Future Minerals Forum in Riyadh had 21,500 attendees; agreements worth USD 26.6 billion were made.
data.description: In Riyadh, Saudi Arabia on January 27, 2026, the Ministry of Industry and Mineral Resources has declared the completion of the fifth edition of the Future Minerals Forum (FMF) with an exceptional turnout of 21,500 attendees. This record-breaking number included prominent figures such as investment leaders and heads of major companies.

data.description: The BYOD Enterprise Mobility Market is experiencing growth as businesses look for adaptable and cost-effective workforce solutions. data.title: Global Poria Cocos Extract Market grows due to natural health trends with rising demand in pharmaceuticals, nutraceuticals & cosmetics, driven by Asia-Pacific interest.
data.description: The Poria Cocos Extract Market is experiencing significant growth due to increased demand for natural and plant-based ingredients in various industries such as pharmaceuticals, nutraceuticals, cosmetics, and functional foods. The market is particularly driven by the rising awareness of traditional herbal remedies, notably in the Asia-Pacific region. In numbers, the market has seen a notable increase in sales and consumption, with a substantial rise in demand for Poria Cocos Extract across different sectors.

data.title: 2026's clinical leaders exceeding cancer benchmarks aiming for $668B oncology therapy market by 2034.
data.description: A press release from Oncolytics Biotech Inc. in Vancouver, BC on January 27, 2026 reveals that the global oncology therapy market is projected to reach a substantial valuation of $668 billion by 2034. This growth is attributed to a capital rotation that is rewarding execution-ready strategies in the industry.

data.title: New coastal hotel, The Luce, in St. Pete Beach accepting reservations for March 2026 opening. Website: www.thelucehotel.com.
data.description: The latest Marriott Tribute Portfolio property, The Luce, situated in St. Pete Beach, Florida, has commenced accepting guest reservations for upcoming stays starting on January 27, 2026. This new addition to the vibrant shoreline of St. Pete Beach can be booked through the official website www.thelucehotel.com. The Luce promises a unique beach escape experience for visitors, with a range of amenities and services.

data.title: Pudgy Penguins (CRYPTO: PENGU) remains stable despite market fluctuations. Price $0.0095, Market Cap $597.3 million. Trader sentiments positive for long term.
data.description: Pudgy Penguins (PENGU) has shown little movement in the past month, with its price at $0.009500 and a market cap of $597.3 million. This meme coin's long-term prospects are improving despite recent fluctuations. In comparison, Dogecoin (DOGE) is priced at $0.1222 with a market cap of $20.6 billion, and Shiba Inu (SHIB) at $0.00057666 with a market cap of $4.5 billion. Altcoin Sherpa suggests that PENGU is not an appealing short-term option due to strong fundamentals and high trading volumes. The emphasis is on accumulating in the suggested buy range, recognizing that the fervor around meme coins like PENGU has subsided. For further details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: SOCRadar recognized in MarketsandMarkets' 360Quadrants for Threat Intelligence Market, Delray Beach, Jan. 27, 2026.
data.description: A company based in Delray Beach, Florida, known as SOCRadar, has recently been acknowledged as a forward-thinking entity in the Threat Intelligence Market evaluation conducted by MarketsandMarkets' 360Quadrants. The recognition underlines SOCRadar's position as a prominent Extended Threat Intelligence (XTI) provider. This news was disclosed on January 27, 2026.

data.title: Global Wellness Institute reveals US as top wellness market at $2.1 trillion, surpassing China at $950 billion. UAE, Saudi Arabia, India, Mexico, Poland are top growing markets.
data.description: According to the latest "Country Rankings" report, the United States continues to dominate the wellness market with a value of $2.1 trillion, which is over twice the size of the second-ranking China at $950 billion. Noteworthy growth in major markets was seen in the UAE, Saudi Arabia, India, Mexico, and Poland. This data comes from a report released on January 27, 2026, in Miami.

data.title: InventHelp inventor from Kennesaw, Ga., develops new fruitcake called ETHEL'S FRUIT CAKES, hoping to share family recipe.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 27, 2026, an inventor from Kennesaw, Georgia shared the inspiration behind creating ETHEL'S FRUIT CAKES. The inventor mentioned having a family recipe for a unique fruitcake that they believed would be a hit not only during the holidays but year-round. The new product aims to provide a delectable option for consumers looking to enjoy a traditional treat.

data.title: Charlotte Maddox joins Lochner as the National Water Practice Lead, providing strategic leadership for the firm's water practice.
data.description: In a recent announcement on January 27, 2026, Lochner, a company under the Egis Group umbrella, welcomed Charlotte A. Maddox, PE, D.WRE, CFM as their new National Water Practice Lead. Maddox will be taking charge of steering Lochner's water practice on a national scale, showcasing her expertise in the field. This appointment signifies a strong move by Lochner to enhance and expand its water-related services, highlighting their commitment to focusing on this sector.

data.title: 1 year into Trump's second term, SEC shifts focus away from major crypto cases, impacting its approach.
data.description: After one year under the second Trump administration, the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has shifted its focus away from large cryptocurrency cases, opting to revise its priorities.

data.title: Ontario hospitals facing longer wait-times & overcrowding as 10,000 job losses expected & shortfall of 4,080 beds predicted.
data.description: In response to budget cuts imposed by the Conservative government, hospitals in Ontario are reducing staff by hundreds and eliminating unfilled positions. The province's largest health care union, CUPE, has expressed concerns about potential negative impacts such as longer wait times, rushed care, preventable errors, and overcrowding in hospital hallways. A recent report titled "Driven to the brink: projected cuts to intensify Ontario’s hospital crisis" released by CUPE highlights the increased resources needed just to sustain current operations, painting a bleak picture for the future of healthcare in the region.
